title: Implement tickflow supervisor decision loop
description: Add the per-tick supervisor loop with decisions accept, continue, repair, handoff, and escalate. Do not accept subagent prose alone; accept only closed/awaiting tick state plus passing verifiers. Generate sharp continuation/repair prompts when the tick remains open or verifiers fail.
acceptance_criteria: A tick that remains open after a subagent attempt is retried with a continuation prompt until closed/awaiting/max attempts; a failed verifier triggers a repair prompt; max attempts routes to awaiting escalation with a note.
